title: Implement BYOK Proxy for OpenAI Compatibility
description: Develop a Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) proxy to ensure compatibility with OpenAI, allowing users to integrate their own keys seamlessly.
business_req: Enhance compatibility with major AI platforms to increase user adoption.
user_story: As a developer, I want to use my own OpenAI keys so that I can maintain control over my API usage and costs.
validation_notes: The ticket lacks acceptance criteria, related files, technical notes, and change references, making it incomplete and untestable.

user_story: As a non-English speaking user, I want documentation in my language so that I can understand and use the software effectively.

title: Improve CLI Auto-Detection Mechanism

user_story: As a developer, I want reliable CLI detection so that I can focus on my work without interruptions.

title: Create Quickstart Guide for New Users
description: Develop a comprehensive quickstart guide to help new users set up and start using Open Design quickly and efficiently.
business_req: Facilitate user onboarding to reduce churn and increase user satisfaction by providing clear and concise setup instructions. Ensure that users can quickly and effectively utilize Open Design's features, minimizing the time to first value.
user_story: As a new user, I want a quickstart guide so that I can begin using Open Design without confusion, ensuring a smooth onboarding experience and allowing me to leverage its full capabilities quickly.
acceptance_criteria: The quickstart guide must include step-by-step instructions for setting up Open Design on a local machine.
The guide should cover the installation and configuration of at least one coding-agent CLI.
Instructions must be provided for both CLI and non-CLI users, including the OpenAI-compatible BYOK proxy setup.
The guide should be available in English and at least one other language from the existing translations.
The quickstart guide should be easily accessible from the main README.md file.
technical_notes: Ensure that the quickstart guide is aligned with the existing README and other documentation files. Consider using the existing QUICKSTART.md as a base and update it with the latest setup instructions. Pay attention to the integration of the 12 coding-agent CLIs and the OpenAI-compatible BYOK proxy setup. Verify that all instructions are compatible with the latest version of Open Design.
validation_notes: The ticket lacks acceptance criteria, related files, technical notes, and change references.
